field.comment:
IMPORTANT
After changing Typography's settings, you have to re-deploy the static content and clean Magento cache to see your changes applied.

field.label: Font Library
field.comment: Default Google Font.

field.label: Font Family
field.comment: Determine the font family for regular text. If ‘Inherit’ selected, default font family will be used.

field.label: Font Family Name
field.comment: The current font in use is 'Helvetica'. Follow our userguide to add a custom font.

field.label: Google Font
field.comment: Font preview: this is the preview of the font selected

field.label: Base Font Size
field.comment: The font size of most of other elements (eg. heading elements ) will be automatically calculated relative to this value.

field.label: Heading Font Library
field.comment: Default Google Font.

field.label: Heading Font Family
field.comment: Determine the font family for regular text. If ‘Inherit’ selected, default font family will be used.

field.label: Heading Font Family Name
field.comment: The current font in use is 'Helvetica'. Follow our userguide to add a custom font.

field.label: Heading Google Font
field.comment: Font preview: this is the preview of the font selected

IMPORTANT
After changing Color's settings, you have to re-deploy the static content and clean Magento cache to see your changes applied.

field.label: Primary Color
field.comment: Default color: #f0141e. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Primary Text Color
field.comment: Default color: #777. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Secondary Text Color
field.comment: Default color: #999. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Primary Link Color
field.comment: Default color: #000. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Primary Link Hover Color
field.comment: Default color: #f0141e. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Primary Border Color
field.comment: Default color: #eee. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Secondary Border Color
field.comment: Default color: #000. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Head Background Color
field.comment: Default color: #181818. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Head Background Image
field.comment: Allowed file types: png, gif, jpg, jpeg, svg.

field.label: Head Background Position
field.comment: Support three types of values: Length values (eg. 100px 5px); Percentages (e.g. 100% 5%); Keywords (e.g. top right, center bottom, inherit)

field.label: Head Background Repeat
field.comment: Set with values - repeat, repeat-x, repeat-y, no-repeat or inherit

field.label: Head Text Color
field.comment: If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Head Link Color
field.comment: If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Head Link Hover Color
field.comment: If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Header Background Color
field.comment: Default color: #f0141e. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Header Background Image
field.comment: Allowed file types: png, gif, jpg, jpeg, svg.

field.label: Header Background Position
field.comment: Support three types of values: Length values (eg. 100px 5px); Percentages (e.g. 100% 5%); Keywords (e.g. top right, center bottom, inherit)

field.label: Header Background Repeat
field.comment: Set with values - repeat, repeat-x, repeat-y, no-repeat or inherit

field.label: Main Background Color
field.comment: If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Main Background Image
field.comment: Allowed file types: png, gif, jpg, jpeg, svg.

field.label: Main Background Position
field.comment: Support three types of values: Length values (eg. 100px 5px); Percentages (e.g. 100% 5%); Keywords (e.g. top right, center bottom, inherit)

field.label: Main Background Repeat
field.comment: Set with values - repeat, repeat-x, repeat-y, no-repeat or inherit

field.label: Footer Background Color
field.comment: Default color: #181818. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Footer Background Image
field.comment: Allowed file types: png, gif, jpg, jpeg, svg.

field.label: Footer Background Position
field.comment: Support three types of values: Length values (eg. 100px 5px); Percentages (e.g. 100% 5%); Keywords (e.g. top right, center bottom, inherit)

field.label: Footer Background Repeat
field.comment: Set with values - repeat, repeat-x, repeat-y, no-repeat or inherit

field.label: Footer Text Color
field.comment: Default color: #777. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Footer Link Color
field.comment: Default color: #777. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Footer Link Hover Color
field.comment: Default color: #f0141e. If empty, default value will be used.

field.label: Enable menu sticky
field.comment: If set 'Yes', sticky menu allows to make your store pages 'sticky' as soon as it hits the top of the page when your users scroll down.

field.label: Enable on Page
field.comment: Catalog Products List widget applies only when the Display Page Control is enabled.

field.label: Enable in Categories
field.comment: Specify the Category ID(s) (separated by comma) that you want to enable the infinite scrolling.

field.label: Loading Mode
field.comment: If Infinite Loading is enabled for Widget, only "Load More Button" is available.

field.label: Scrolling Page Limit
field.comment: When this page number is reached, 'Load More' button will be shown instead of continue loading products automatically with the scroll.

field.label: Add Page Parameter to Urls
field.comment: Example : https://yourdomain.com/magento/men.html?p=2

field.label: Ajax Loading Icon
field.comment: Allowed file types: png, gif, ipg, jpeg, svg.

IMPORTANT
After changing Category view settings, you have to clean Magento cache to see your changes applied.

field.label: Enable Alternative Product Image
field.comment: When mouse hover on a product (List/Grid), You can see a thumbnail image.

field.label: Items per Row (Desktop)
field.comment: Specify the number of product columns displayed if the browser viewport width (≥992px). Please input to textbox with requirement number only.

field.label: Items per Row Tablet (Landscape)
field.comment: Specify the number of product columns displayed if the browser viewport width (≥992px). Please input to textbox with requirement number only.

field.label: Items per Row Tablet (Portrait)
field.comment: Specify the number of product columns displayed if the browser viewport width (≥768px). Please input to textbox with requirement number only.

field.label: Items per Row Mobile (Landscape)
field.comment: Specify the number of product columns displayed if the browser viewport width (<768px). Please input to textbox with requirement number only.

field.label: Items per Row Mobile (Portrait)
field.comment: Specify the number of product columns displayed if the browser viewport width (<480px). Please input to textbox with requirement number only.

field.label: Duration
field.comment: Sets transition duration in milliseconds.

field.label: Enable Magnifier
field.comment: If set to 'No', default Magento zoom feature will be used.

field.label: Magnifier Width
field.comment: Width of the magnifier block in pixels.

field.label: Magnifier Height
field.comment: Width of the magnifier block in pixels.

field.label: Limit
field.comment: Set a default limit on the number of related products displayed on the product page.

field.label: Limit
field.comment: Set a default limit on the number of upsell products displayed on the product page.

field.label: Show Google Map
field.comment: Set to 'No' if you wish to hide Google Map on the contact page.

field.label: Map:
field.comment: Supported Iframe.

field.label: Image Width
field.comment: Specify value in pixels.

field.label: Image Height
field.comment: Specify value in pixels.

field.label: Load Additional CSS Files
field.comment:
In order to add a custom CSS file, you should follow steps below:
1. Upload your custom CSS file to the server which you can override the default styling of the theme. The directory is as follows: app/design/frontend/Ubertheme/bookshop/default/web/css/custom
2. In the Additional CSS field, enter the CSS file name needed for custom style. Multiple files should be separated by a comma.

field.label: Custom CSS
field.comment: You can add your own CSS styles directly here, which allows you to override the default styles of your Theme.
